plugins.name: core-skills
plugins.description: The HyperFrames core set — install this one: the /hyperframes router, the hyperframes-* domain skills, and media-use. The router installs each creation workflow on demand. The full bundle (all skills at once) is `hyperframes`.

plugins.name: hyperframes
plugins.description: All HyperFrames skills in one static bundle. Most setups want `core-skills` instead — the router installs creation workflows on demand. HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website capture for HyperFrames.
